{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230051362DAF4C70CAA8BBF3AE54"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617040556729615129","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，对我来超棒，支持了[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773484081,"group_id":"7614353479003278361","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwmx7lIu74lmQ46MdaBU6Nw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"336911922367656","user_name":"喜欢牵牛的安千君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"336911922367656","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7614353479003278361","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫+银河奥特曼+奈克瑟斯世界观+逼王+龙傲天】
耀星宸锻炼十年，激活系统进化成本体奥银河奥特曼，开局就是银巨神实力，至始至终都保持着高战力，得知这世界竟然是奈克瑟斯世界观，还有本土地球怪兽以及宇宙人。
天空一声巨响，银河炸地闪亮登场，单膝撑地，转头回眸，敌人们将面对的，是一个装逼如风，常伴吾身，脸上写着无敌的曼！
“无论你有多强，银河始终在你之上。”
单手叉腰，亦或双臂环抱，银河四十五度侧身战，眼角余光蔑视着敌人走秀站位，手臂一挥，食指一勾充满挑衅。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/44d2cfe913f037aeb0b1425754335737","author":"神武天尊","author_id":"","book_id":"7614353479003278361","book_name":"综漫：满级人类，我，逼王银河","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5649人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7614353522846335513","read_count":"5649","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"76034"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"36","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,奥特同人,系统,穿越,综漫,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cbb81e42f7dae302a6cd9cdd72223c1a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382296&x-signature=cr%2FTtDeeEnwzseAkIAkx2wZ8H8k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"893246629492007","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","n
